test_cases.title: PiTransport.start() spawns pi --mode rpc process
test_cases.description: Verify PiTransport spawns pi with correct args and establishes JSONL communication

test_cases.title: PiTransport.start() throws on ENOENT
test_cases.description: When pi is not in PATH, start() throws descriptive error (AC-5)
steps: verify error message mentions 'not found' or 'not installed'

test_cases.title: PiTransport.send() writes JSON to stdin
test_cases.description: Verify RPC commands are serialized as JSONL to Pi stdin
steps: verify stdin.write called with valid JSON + newline

test_cases.title: PiTransport parses valid JSONL from stdout
test_cases.description: Verify stdout lines are parsed and emitted as events
steps: verify onEvent handler receives parsed object

test_cases.title: PiTransport skips malformed JSONL (AC-8)
test_cases.description: Malformed JSON lines are logged as warning and skipped without crashing
steps: verify no crash, warning logged, session continues

test_cases.title: PiTransport.kill() terminates subprocess (AC-6)
test_cases.description: kill() sends SIGTERM to the child process

test_cases.title: PiTransport.onClose fires on subprocess exit (AC-7)
test_cases.description: When Pi process exits, onClose handler is called with exit code

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter converts text_delta to text AgentMessage
test_cases.description: message_update with assistantMessageEvent.type='text_delta' produces text AgentMessage
steps: verify result is [{ type: 'text', text: deltaValue }]

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter converts thinking_delta to reasoning AgentMessage
test_cases.description: message_update with assistantMessageEvent.type='thinking_delta' produces reasoning AgentMessage with live:true
steps: verify result is [{ type: 'reasoning', text: deltaValue, live: true }]

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter converts tool_execution_start to tool_call
test_cases.description: tool_execution_start produces tool_call AgentMessage with in_progress status
steps: verify result has tool_call with correct id, name, input, status='in_progress'

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter converts tool_execution_end to tool_result
test_cases.description: tool_execution_end produces tool_result AgentMessage with completed/failed status based on is_error

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter converts turn_end to usage + turn_complete (2 messages)
test_cases.description: turn_end produces two AgentMessages: usage then turn_complete
steps: call convert with turn_end event containing usage data
first is usage, second is turn_complete

test_cases.title: PiEventConverter returns empty array for unknown events
test_cases.description: agent_end, response, turn_start, and unknown types return []

test_cases.title: hapi pi command exits with error when pi not in PATH (AC-5)
test_cases.description: Running 'hapi pi' without pi installed shows error and exits non-zero

test_cases.title: hapi pi registers 'pi' in AGENT_FLAVORS
test_cases.description: Verify shared/src/modes.ts includes 'pi' in AGENT_FLAVORS and PI_PERMISSION_MODES

test_cases.title: runPi creates session and routes messages (AC-1, AC-2)
test_cases.description: runPi bootstraps session, starts transport, routes user messages to Pi
steps: verify transport.send called with prompt on user message

test_cases.title: runPi handles abort request (AC-3)
test_cases.description: Abort RPC triggers transport.send with abort command

test_cases.title: runPi handles model switch (AC-4)
test_cases.description: Session config RPC triggers transport.send with set_model command

test_cases.title: runPi cleans up on Pi crash (AC-7)
test_cases.description: When transport emits close with error, runPi shows error and ends session

test_cases.title: runPi cleans up on HAPI exit (AC-6)
test_cases.description: SIGTERM to HAPI triggers transport.kill()

test_cases.title: Basic text conversation via hapi pi
test_cases.description: Verify full event sequence for a simple prompt: response→agent_start→turn_start→message_update(text_delta)→turn_end→agent_end (AC-1, AC-2)
steps: type: Say "hello world" and nothing else
verify text response appears in terminal

test_cases.title: Tool execution — file read triggers tool_execution_start/end
test_cases.description: Verify tool_execution_start{toolCallId, toolName, args} and tool_execution_end{toolCallId, result, isError} event fields match types.ts definitions
steps: verify tool call appears (tool_execution_start with toolName, args)
verify tool result appears (tool_execution_end with result)

test_cases.title: Tool execution — file write
test_cases.description: Verify another tool type (write_file or Bash) triggers tool_execution_start/end correctly
steps: type: Create a file /tmp/hapi-pi-write-test.txt with content 'hello from pi'

test_cases.title: Tool execution failure — file not found
test_cases.description: Verify tool_execution_end with isError=true produces status='failed' in HAPI (AC-2, AC-8)
steps: verify Pi reports the error (not crash)

test_cases.title: Thinking/reasoning lifecycle
test_cases.description: Verify thinking_start→thinking_delta*→thinking_end→text_start→text_delta*→text_end full lifecycle and usage data in turn_end
steps: type: What is 17^13? Show your reasoning step by step.
verify turn_end contains usage data with non-zero token counts

test_cases.title: Multi-turn conversation with context retention
test_cases.description: Verify turn_end→turn_start cycle works for multiple rounds and context is preserved
steps: round 1: type 'My favorite color is blue. Remember this.'
round 2: type 'What is my favorite color?'

test_cases.title: Abort long-running generation (AC-3)
test_cases.description: Send abort while Pi is generating, verify graceful stop
steps: type: Write a 1000-word essay about the history of computing
wait 2 seconds for generation to start
verify session returns to ready state (not crashed)

test_cases.title: Pi not in PATH — ENOENT error (AC-5)
test_cases.description: Running hapi pi without pi installed shows descriptive error
steps: verify stderr contains 'Pi was not found on PATH'

test_cases.title: Hub not running — connection error
test_cases.description: hapi pi fails gracefully when hub is unreachable
steps: verify error message about connection failure

test_cases.title: Invalid CLI_API_TOKEN — 401 error
test_cases.description: hapi pi reports auth failure with wrong token

test_cases.title: Model switch via session config RPC (AC-4)
test_cases.description: Switch model during active session, verify set_model RPC sent to Pi
steps: via web UI or RPC, request model change to another model
verify subsequent messages use new model

test_cases.title: Normal exit via Ctrl+C — cleanup (AC-6)
test_cases.description: Ctrl+C terminates Pi subprocess and cleans up session
steps: verify no orphan pi process (ps aux | grep 'pi --mode rpc')
verify hub session marked as ended

test_cases.title: Pi process crash — error handling (AC-7)
test_cases.description: Killing Pi subprocess triggers error display and session cleanup
steps: start hub + hapi pi in terminal A
verify terminal A shows error about Pi process exit
verify hub session marked as error/ended

test_cases.title: Usage/token count in turn_end
test_cases.description: Verify turn_end.message.usage contains realistic token counts (input>0, output>0, totalTokens>0)
steps: check hub logs or debug output for usage event

test_cases.title: Extension UI request events ignored gracefully
test_cases.description: Pi sends many extension_ui_request events at startup; verify they are silently ignored and don't affect conversation
steps: wait for Pi startup (extension_ui_request events fire on stdout)
verify no errors or warnings from these events
type a message and verify normal response
